message:
fix(engine): expiry boundary semantics and saga mapping correction

key_attestation: change is_expired to use exclusive boundary (> instead
  of >=) so that the exact expiry timestamp is still considered valid —
  the attestation expires AFTER the expires_at moment, not AT it

tee_attestation_policy: change override expiry to use inclusive boundary
  (>= instead of >) so overrides expire AT the expires_epoch, consistent
  with epoch-based expiry semantics where the expiry epoch is the first
  invalid epoch

execution_orchestrator: revert Suspend saga mapping back to
  SagaType::Revocation — Suspension saga type does not match the
  containment action's intended cleanup semantics

Also syncs beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
